title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Research Scientist III Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Project Research Scientist III Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Go...
